manifest.install: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_banner` ( `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL, `bannername` varchar(50) DEFAULT '', `link` varchar(255) DEFAULT '', `thumb` varchar(255) DEFAULT '', `displayorder` int(11) DEFAULT '0', `enabled` int(11) DEFAULT '0', PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_blacklist` ( `id` int(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `room_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `topic_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `black_uid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `black_openid` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `black_nickname` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `black_ip` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL, `create_time` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_cron` ( `id` int(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `module_name` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL, `task_name` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `ext_info` varchar(1000) DEFAULT NULL, `create_time` int(11) DEFAULT '0', PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_discuss` ( `id` int(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `room_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `topic_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `owner_uid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `owner_openid` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `owner_avatar` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, `owner_nickname` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL, `dis_type` varchar(10) DEFAULT NULL, `dis_content` varchar(1000) DEFAULT NULL, `ask_type` tinyint(3) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否是提问', `dis_status` tinyint(3) DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '0-不是ask,1-是ask,2-已回复', `create_time` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_imsetting` ( `id` int(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `sdkappid` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL, `account_type` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL, `admin_account` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL, `check_type` varchar(10) DEFAULT NULL, `create_time` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_invite` ( `id` int(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) NOT NULL, `invite_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `invite_encrypt` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL, `invite_type` varchar(10) NOT NULL, `room_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `topic_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `invite_time` int(10) DEFAULT '0', `invite_openid` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `click_openid` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `click_nickname` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `click_time` int(10) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '接受邀请时间', `invite_status` tinyint(3) DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '1-发出 2-已使用', PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_joinusers` ( `id` int(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `room_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `topic_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `user_uid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `create_time` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `last_time` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_logs` ( `id` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '公众号id', `content` text COMMENT '内容', `time` int(11) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '执行时间', `test` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_manager` ( `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `uid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `create_time` int(11) DEFAULT '0', PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_mycashsum` ( `id` int(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `room_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `topic_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `max_id` int(10) DEFAULT '0', `payto_uid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `pay_money` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT '0.00', `reward_percent` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT '0.00', `my_money` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT '0.00', `batch_num` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `create_time` int(11) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间', PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_mycashsum_last` ( `id` int(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `pay_money` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '原始汇总金额', `payto_uid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '数量', `payto_openid` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `room_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `pay_type` int(10) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '1-个人,2-房间', `status` tinyint(3) DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '1-处理中,2-已打款', `create_time` int(11) DEFAULT '0', `pay_time` int(11) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '结算时间', `transaction_id` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '结算号', `batch_num` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '批次号', PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_payment` ( `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `room_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `topic_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `pay_money` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT '0.00', `pay_uid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `pay_type` varchar(10) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '支付类型1-赞赏 2-付费直播 3-分答', `pay_openid` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `pay_nickname` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `pay_avatar` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `pay_time` int(11) DEFAULT '0', `payto_uid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `payto_openid` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `payto_nickname` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `payto_avatar` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `pay_status` tinyint(3) DEFAULT NULL, `transaction_id` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '交易流水号', `out_trade_no` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '订单号', `create_time` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_ppt` ( `id` int(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `topic_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `img_url` varchar(500) DEFAULT NULL, `img_order` int(10) DEFAULT '0', `create_uid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `is_send` tinyint(3) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否已发', `is_current` tinyint(3) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否当前', `create_time` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_room` ( `id` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '所属公众号', `room_id` int(11) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '房间ID', `room_name` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '房间名字', `room_desc` varchar(1000) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '房间描述', `create_uid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '创建人uid', `create_openid` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '创建人openid', `create_nickname` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `create_avatar` varchar(150) DEFAULT NULL, `room_icon` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '直播间图标', `qrcode_url` varchar(150) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '二维码图片地址', `qrcode_desc` varchar(1000) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '二维码图片描述', `room_status` tinyint(3) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '直播间状态', `reward_status` tinyint(3) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0-不开启,1-开启', `reward_percent` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT '-1.00' COMMENT '分成比例', `create_time` int(11) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '创建时间', PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_roombrowse` ( `id` int(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `uid` int(10) NOT NULL, `openid` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `room_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `topic_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `brow_type` varchar(10) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'room,topic', `update_time` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `create_time` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_roomcashsum` ( `id` int(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `room_id` int(11) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '直播间id', `topic_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `max_id` int(10) DEFAULT '0', `pay_type` varchar(10) DEFAULT NULL, `pay_money` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '赞赏原始金额', `room_money` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '最终赞赏金额', `reward_percent` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT '0.00', `batch_num` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `create_time` int(11) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间', PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_roomcashsum_last` ( `id` int(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `uniacid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `pay_money` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '原始汇总金额', `room_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '数量', `status` tinyint(3) DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '1-处理中,2-已打款', `create_time` int(11) DEFAULT '0', `pay_time` int(11) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '结算时间', `transaction_id` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '结算号', `batch_num` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '批次号' ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_roommanager` ( `id` int(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `room_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '所属公众号', `uid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `manage_openid` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '嘉宾openid', `manage_avatar` varchar(150) DEFAULT NULL, `manage_nickname` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '嘉宾昵称', `manage_desc` varchar(1000) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '嘉宾简介', `create_time` int(10) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '加入时间', PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_sign` ( `id` int(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `uid` int(10) NOT NULL, `user_name` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `sign_result` varchar(1500) DEFAULT NULL, `sign_time` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `expire_time` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_subjects` ( `id` int(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `room_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `topic_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `sub_type` varchar(10) DEFAULT NULL, `sub_content` varchar(1000) DEFAULT NULL, `sub_content_down` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '文件下载后的路径(定时下载)', `sub_content_downtime` int(11) DEFAULT '0', `sub_content_ext` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '扩展信息（声音时长）', `sub_status` tinyint(10) DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '话题状态(1-正常,2-撤回)', `owner_uid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `owner_openid` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, `owner_nickname` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, `owner_avatar` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, `role_name` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '角色', `create_time` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `ppt_id` int(10) DEFAULT '0', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `roomindex` (`room_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_subscribe` ( `id` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `openid` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `nickname` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `sub_type` varchar(10) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'room,topic 房间和话题', `uid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `room_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '关注的room_id', `topic_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '关注的话题', `create_time` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_topic` ( `id` int(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `room_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `create_openid` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `topic_name` varchar(500) DEFAULT NULL, `topic_desc` varchar(1000) DEFAULT NULL, `topic_type` varchar(10) DEFAULT NULL, `topic_icon` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, `begin_time` int(11) DEFAULT '0', `end_time` int(11) DEFAULT '0', `room_paymoney` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT '0.00', `room_password` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL, `qrcode_url` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, `qrcode_desc` varchar(1000) DEFAULT NULL, `look_numbers` int(10) DEFAULT '0', `comment_numbers` int(10) DEFAULT '0', `is_showguid` tinyint(3) DEFAULT '1', `topic_status` tinyint(3) DEFAULT '1', `is_allshutup` tinyint(3) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否讨论区禁言', `reward_percent` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT '0.00', `im_group_id` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '云通讯聊天室id', `create_time` int(11) DEFAULT '0', `x_look_numbers` int(10) DEFAULT '0', `is_opendm` tinyint(3) DEFAULT '1', `guest_name` varchar(500) DEFAULT NULL, `guest_info` varchar(1500) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_topicguest` ( `id` int(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `room_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '所属公众号', `topic_id` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `uid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '嘉宾uid', `guest_openid` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '嘉宾openid', `guest_avatar` varchar(150) DEFAULT NULL, `guest_nickname` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '嘉宾昵称', `guest_desc` varchar(1000) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '嘉宾简介', `create_time` int(10) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '加入时间', PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_topictype` ( `id` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `topic_typeid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `topic_typename` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL, `topic_text` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_chat_users` ( `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `openid` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `nickname` varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL, `avatar` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, `province` varchar(30) DEFAULT NULL, `city` varchar(30) DEFAULT NULL, `unionid` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `sex` tinyint(3) DEFAULT NULL, `mobile` varchar(11) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '电话号码', `real_name` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '真实姓名', `subscribe_time` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `is_openask` tinyint(3) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0-不开,1-开启,-1-被禁用', `user_title` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `user_desc` varchar(1000) DEFAULT NULL, `pay_money` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT '0.00', `is_recommend` tinyint(4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '0-正常,1-推荐', `answer_num` int(10) DEFAULT '0', `follow_num` int(10) DEFAULT '0', `tags` varchar(1000) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '标签', `create_time` int(11) DEFAULT '0', `vstatus` int(1) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '认证状态（0=未认证；1=认证通过；2=认证未通过）', PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;
